synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0616 Oracle Linux 8 .NET 9.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0616
description:
[9.0.113-1.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[9.0.113-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.113 and Runtime 9.0.12
- Resolves: RHEL-138644
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0616

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0616.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
aspnetcore-runtime-9.0-9.0.12-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
aspnetcore-runtime-dbg-9.0-9.0.12-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
